hooks.command: echo '[cairn] Session start. This repo is a cairn (research project memory). Read PROJECT.md for orientation and TRACKING.md for how to capture state from conversation without making the user invoke commands by hand. Skills are in skills/<name>/SKILL.md (use the debrief skill at session end). Project state follows below.' && (cairn status 2>/dev/null || echo '(cairn CLI not on PATH — see PROJECT.md, or write .claude/settings.local.json with a PATH entry pointing at your env)')
